attributes.name: Description
attributes.content: Ms. 35 Arganon - UCLA Library Digital Collections

childNodes.textContent: Ms. 35 Arganon - UCLA Library Digital Collections
Texts in black ink, the beginning of each prayer and St. Mary's name is in red ink.
The manuscript is composed of quires of eight and ten leaves each.
Layout:  Two columns per page, 18 lines of text per page.

P. 1 Canon on fasting ;Pp. 2-3 Geneology of Ethiopian Monastic leaders ;P. 4 List of saints day ;Pp. 5 Arganon (Hymns of St. Mary)አርጋኖን ;Pp. 5-51 of Monday ዘሰኑይ ;Pp. 51-88 of Tuesday ዘሠሉስ ; Pp. 89-126 of Wednesday ዘረቡዕ ;Pp. 127-167 of Thursday ዘሐሙስ ;Pp. 167-203 of Friday ዘአርብ ;Pp. 204-220 of Saturday ዘቀዳሚት ;Pp. 221-256 of Sunday ዘእሑድ .
References should always be the last field
University of California, Los Angeles. Library. Department of Special Collections
UCLA Library Special Collections, A1713 Charles E. Young Research Library, Box 951575, Los Angeles, CA 90095-1575. Email: spec-coll@library.ucla.edu. Phone: (310) 825-4958
